response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer with strong breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the resume shows minimal recent C++ work (only a brief stint at National Instruments ~2000-2001 and a bachelor thesis project). The role requires deep, current C++/STL expertise, multi-threading, message brokers, IoT protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA), and IEC 62443 secure development practices — none of which are evident. Primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, which does not align with the core C++ industrial automation requirements.
strengths: Long tenure with senior/staff-level full-stack engineering experience
Background touching embedded systems, IoT-adjacent work, and distributed architectures
Strong testing/TDD culture and mentoring/workshop track record
concerns: No substantial recent C++/STL development experience for production systems
No exposure to industrial protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850) or IEC 62443 SDL
Career trajectory is web/full-stack rather than high-performance systems or industrial automation
